message:
feat(recorder): add operator observability hooks for reindex cutover

Add ReindexStats, ReindexObserver trait, and reindex_range_observed()
for operator dashboard integration during FrankenSqlite cutover.

- Add ReindexStats struct with event_count, duration_ms, events_per_sec
- Add ReindexObserver trait with on_progress/on_complete callbacks
- Add NullObserver no-op implementation
- Add reindex_range_observed() with observer + structured info!/warn! logs
- Progress callbacks fire per committed batch with ETA estimates
- Stall warning emitted when events read but zero indexed
- 9 new tests: progress callback invocation, monotonic ordinals,
  accurate stats, completion callback, empty range callback,
  throughput computation, Debug/Clone/Serialize, NullObserver
- All 90 tantivy_reindex tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
